text:
This page is obsolete:

http://www.freshports.org/lang/OpenCoarrays/

I named the port originally with capital "O" and "C", but
it was changed to lang/opencoarrays by the committer.
So the above page must not be there.
The port is:

http://www.freshports.org/lang/opencoarrays
